title: Fraction Symbols: Copy & Paste ½ ⅓ ¼ Unicode Fractions
meta_description: Copy and paste Unicode fraction symbols — halves, thirds, quarters, eighths, and more vulgar fractions. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every precomposed Unicode fraction — halves, thirds, quarters, eighths, and beyond. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Vulgar (precomposed) fraction characters render a complete fraction in a single glyph. This library collects the common halves, thirds, and quarters along with eighths, fifths, sixths, sevenths, ninths, and more.

sections.label: Common
sections.intro: The everyday fractions: halves, thirds, and quarters.

sections.label: More
sections.intro: Fifths, sixths, sevenths, ninths, tenths, and the zero-thirds sign.

related.title: Number Symbols
related.desc: Circled, superscript, Roman, and other Unicode number forms.

related.title: Math Symbols
related.desc: Mathematical operators, Greek letters, and comparison signs.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.
